zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lister於1558年11月5日出生在英國越可爾賓格利時，他的父親Thome Lister17歲，母親Alice Hoghton16歲。他於大約1586年與Jane Greenacres在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1610年4月9日在英國越可爾易亞斯特 莫頓享年51歲，埋葬在英國越可爾賓格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lister于1558年11月5日出生在英国越可爾賓格利时，他的父亲Thome Lister17岁，母亲Alice Hoghton16岁。他于大约1586年与Jane Greenacres在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1610年4月9日在英国越可爾易亞斯特 莫頓享年51岁，埋葬在英国越可爾賓格利。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lister was born on 5 November 1558, in Bingley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thome Lister, was 17 and his mother, Alice Hoghton, was 16. He married Jane Greenacres about 1586, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 April 1610, in East Morton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Bingley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Saint Mary the Virgin, Gisburn, Lancashi: Saint Mary the Virgin, Deane, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lister est né le 5 novembre 1558, à Bingley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thome Lister, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Alice Hoghton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Jane Greenacres environ 1586, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1610, à East Morton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Bingley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Saint Mary the Virgin, Gisburn, Lancashi: Saint Mary the Virgin, Deane, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lister am 5. November 1558 in Bingley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thome Lister 17 und seine Mutter Alice Hoghton 16. Er hat um 1586 in Lancashire, England Jane Greenacres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1610 im Alter von 51 Jahren in East Morton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bingley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister è nato il il 5 novembre 1558 nel Bingley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Thome Lister, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hoghton, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Jane Greenacres circa 1586, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1610, nel East Morton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Bingley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Listerが1558年11月5日にイギリスヨークシュアイアビングリーで生まれた時，父Thome Listerは17歳，母Alice Hoghtonは16歳であった。約1586年にイギリスランカシュアイアでJane Greenacresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1610年4月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスト モートンで51歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアビングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary the Virgin, Gisburn, Lancashi: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 디인 세인트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister(이)가 1558년 11월 5일 영국 요르크실르 빙글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thome Lister(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hoghton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1586년 영국 랭카실르에서 Jane Greenacres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 4월 9일 영국 요르크실르 이스트 모르턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 빙글리에 묻혔다.

pt.05 Nov 1558–09 Apr 1610: 5 de novembro de 1558–9 de abril de 1610
pt.Saint Mary the Virgin, Gisburn, Lancashi: Saint Mary the Virgin, Deane, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister nasceu em 5 de novembro de 1558, em Bingley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thome Lister, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hoghton, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Greenacres aproximadamente 1586, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1610, em East Morton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Bingley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Mary the Virgin, Gisburn, Lancashi: сеинт мэри т виргин, дин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lister родился 5 ноября 1558 г. в местности бингли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thome Lister было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hoghton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Greenacres около 1586 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 апреля 1610 г. в местности эаст мортон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности бингли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Lister nació el 5 de noviembre de 1558, en Bingley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thome Lister, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Alice Hoghton, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Jane Greenacres aproximadamente 1586, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1610, en East Morton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Bingley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
